The '''Martial Cross''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] that reached its terminus at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], the Martial Cross was used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fourth Fleet]] during the their attempt to [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|retake Coruscant]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Route-stub}}
